title: GWI POS Hardening Status
description: Per-check pass/fail status with 3-tier service health classification and clock health. Written by verify-health.sh. Lives at /opt/gwi-pos/state/hardening-status.json. Used by heartbeat to report node health to MC, and by baseline-diff for local diagnostics. Example: {"schema_version":"1.0","producer":"verify-health.sh","generated_at":"2026-03-20T14:40:00Z","node_id":"nuc-venue-001","baseline_version":"baseline-2026.03.20.1","checks":{"pos_health":true,"kiosk_running":true,"postgres_ok":true,"firewall_active":true,"sleep_masked":true,"autologin_configured":true,"services_ok":true},"overall":"pass","role":"server"}

producer.description: Name of the script that wrote this file.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this file was written.

node_id.description: Unique node identifier from SERVER_NODE_ID in .env.

checks.description: Individual boolean health checks. All must be true for overall=pass.

pos_health.description: True if thepasspos service is active and responding.

kiosk_running.description: True if thepasspos-kiosk service is active.

postgres_ok.description: True if postgresql service is active and accepting connections.

sleep_masked.description: True if sleep/suspend/hibernate targets are masked.

autologin_configured.description: True if display manager autologin is configured (SDDM or GDM3).

services_ok.description: True if all critical-tier services are running.

critical.description: Services whose failure means the node cannot take orders (thepasspos, postgresql).

degraded.description: Services whose failure means the node operates with limitations (thepasspos-kiosk, thepasspos-sync, keepalived).

informational.description: Services whose failure has no direct customer impact (gwi-pos-verify, gwi-pos-drift).

clock.description: Clock synchronization health. Clock health must never be suppressed per Rule 12.

synced.description: True if chrony reports normal leap status.

offset_ms.description: System clock offset from NTP source in milliseconds. Null if chrony is unavailable.

source.description: NTP source identifier from chronyc tracking. Null if chrony is unavailable.

overall.description: Overall health verdict. 'pass' = all checks OK. 'degraded' = non-critical failures. 'fail' = critical service(s) down.

role.description: Station role (server, backup, terminal) for context.
